introSection:
Seven Dwarfs Mine Train  is a steel roller coaster currently operating at the Shanghai Disneyland in Pudong, Shanghai, China. It opened with the park on 16 June 2016. It is A clone of the ride that opened at Magic Kingdom in Lake Buena Vista, Florida on 28 May 2014. Unlike the other version, it features the well instead of the cottage.

This is a Mine Train installation from Vekoma.
fullText:
Seven Dwarfs Mine Train  is a steel roller coaster currently operating at the Shanghai Disneyland in Pudong, Shanghai, China. It opened with the park on 16 June 2016. It is A clone of the ride that opened at Magic Kingdom in Lake Buena Vista, Florida on 28 May 2014. Unlike the other version, it features the well instead of the cottage.

This is a Mine Train installation from Vekoma.
